properties.name: plugin.endpoint.enable
properties.description: Whether to expose the plugin management endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.uninstall
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin uninstall endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.install
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin install endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.upgrade
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin upgrade endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.plan
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin install dry-run endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.plan-upgrade
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin upgrade dry-run endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.enable-plugin
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin enable endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.disable-plugin
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin disable endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.operations
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin operation audit endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.endpoint.tasks
properties.description: Custom path suffix for the plugin runtime task endpoint.

properties.name: plugin.autoloader.path
properties.description: Directory scanned by the plugin auto-loader.

properties.name: plugin.runtime.core-version
properties.description: Current backend plugin runtime version used for manifest compatibility checks.

properties.name: plugin.runtime.frontend-sdk-version
properties.description: Current frontend plugin SDK version used for manifest compatibility checks.

properties.name: plugin.trust.require-known-sha256
properties.description: Whether every plugin artifact must have a configured trusted SHA-256 digest.

properties.name: plugin.trust.sha256
properties.description: Trusted SHA-256 digests grouped by plugin manifest id.

properties.name: plugin.task-store.jdbc.enabled
properties.description: Whether to store plugin runtime task snapshots in JDBC.

properties.name: plugin.task-store.jdbc.initialize-schema
properties.description: Whether the JDBC plugin task store should create its table on startup.

properties.name: plugin.task-store.jdbc.table-name
properties.description: JDBC table name used by the plugin runtime task store.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.enabled
properties.description: Whether to coordinate plugin runtime operations with a JDBC lease lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.initialize-schema
properties.description: Whether the JDBC plugin runtime coordinator should create its lock table on startup.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.table-name
properties.description: JDBC table name used by the plugin runtime coordinator lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.lock-name
properties.description: Logical lock name used to serialize plugin runtime operations.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.owner-id
properties.description: Stable owner id for this application node when acquiring the plugin runtime lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.lease-duration
properties.description: Lease duration for the JDBC plugin runtime lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.acquire-timeout
properties.description: Maximum time to wait while acquiring the JDBC plugin runtime lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-coordinator.jdbc.retry-interval
properties.description: Retry interval used while acquiring the JDBC plugin runtime lock.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.enabled
properties.description: Whether to record plugin runtime operation events in JDBC for cross-node propagation.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.initialize-schema
properties.description: Whether the JDBC plugin runtime event store should create its table on startup.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.relay-enabled
properties.description: Whether to relay JDBC plugin runtime events from other nodes to the local Spring event bus.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.replay-existing
properties.description: Whether the JDBC plugin runtime event relay should replay existing rows when it starts.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.table-name
properties.description: JDBC table name used by the plugin runtime event log.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.origin-id
properties.description: Stable origin id for this application node when recording or relaying plugin runtime events.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.poll-interval
properties.description: Polling interval used by the JDBC plugin runtime event relay.

properties.name: plugin.runtime-events.jdbc.batch-size
properties.description: Maximum number of JDBC plugin runtime events fetched per relay poll.
